analysis.commitMessage:
ci: add deploy:dev npm script for dev branch automation

Adds a new npm script that runs the dev branch update workflow via scripts/workflows/ci/update-dev-branch.mjs. This enables CI/CD automation for deploying to the development branch.
analysis.issueTitle: Add dev branch deployment automation script
analysis.issueBody:
## Description
Add a new `deploy:dev` npm script to automate deployment updates for the development branch.

## Changes
- New npm script: `deploy:dev` that executes `scripts/workflows/ci/update-dev-branch.mjs`
- Supports automated dev branch updates in CI/CD workflows
- Enables streamlined development branch management

## Related Files
- `scripts/workflows/ci/update-dev-branch.mjs` - Main deployment script
- `package.json` - New npm script definition
- `.agent/rules/update-dev-branch.md` - Documentation
